description: Zero-downtime deployment for Nette apps via the nksdeploy PHP CLI. Wraps the bundled nksdeploy.phar as a CliWrap subprocess, streams NDJSON progress events to the wdc UI, and persists run state in the deploy_runs SQLite table. First-class IDeployBackend implementation; alternative backends (Capistrano, Kamal) can ship side by side.
author: NKS
